title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen Release notes link
scenario: Verify that clicking the release notes link on the new DFU screen opens the correct web page for Osprey EB and CC when an update is available.
steps: 1. Ensure Osprey EB and CC are both at least version 5039 and an update is available for both.
2. Navigate to the new DFU screen.
3. Click the release notes link on the new DFU screen.
4. Verify that the correct web page opens.
6. Click the release notes link on the Settings screen.
7. Verify that the correct web page opens.
expected: Clicking the release notes link on both the new DFU screen and the Settings screen opens the correct web page.
